hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in */src/client/*|src/client/*) echo 'src/client is generated by hey-api (openapi-ts). Edit openapi.json + run pnpm gen:api (or /sync-api) instead.' >&2; exit 2 ;; esac

input=$(cat); printf '%s' "$input" | jq -e '.stop_hook_active==true' >/dev/null 2>&1 && exit 0; git diff --quiet HEAD -- '*.ts' '*.tsx' 2>/dev/null && exit 0; out=$(pnpm exec tsc --noEmit 2>&1 && pnpm exec eslint src --fix 2>&1); [ $? -eq 0 ] && exit 0; printf '%s\n' "$out" >&2; echo 'Fix the tsc/eslint errors above before finishing.' >&2; exit 2
